refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key sub-functions that collectively fulfill the worksite mapping/modeling requirement, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by comparing generated maps/models against ground truth data and ensuring completeness and accuracy of terrain, obstacle, and work-zone features.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition
Implement spatial data processing algorithms for feature extraction and classification
Develop a geospatial database to store and update work-zone models
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses the FR with minimal coupling to other DPs; sensor fusion is a well-defined approach that can be modularized.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and integration of LIDAR and camera sensors on the NGHE platform
Risk of sensor data inconsistency or environmental interference affecting mapping accuracy
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing data processing and database management DPs separately in subsequent decomposition levels.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level module responsible for integrating sensor data, processing, and generating the worksite model

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with Safety Services and remote operators

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite mapping is a core system function; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Vehicle module provides raw data but does not contain mapping logic; high diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Teleoperation consumes mapping data but should not implement mapping functions.
Safety Services uses mapping data for alerts but is not responsible for generation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized
Integration complexity with Vehicle telemetry and Teleoperation tasking interfaces
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate partitioning sensor data acquisition and processing into submodules within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion approach.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing mapping logic in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion risk but requires careful interface design.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best IM boundary for this DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and cross-checking interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of NGHE Solution for sensor data processing and database management in next level.
Clarify interface protocols for Telemetry and Tasking to ensure seamless integration.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of DP and IM submodules is needed to manage complexity and performance risks before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

revise.why: To modularize sensor data processing and database management within NGHE Solution and reduce integration complexity.

assumptions: LIDAR and camera sensors are available and integrated on Vehicle
NGHE Solution module can handle centralized processing
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of sensor fusion processing
Interface protocol specifications and test results
